name: med-research-powers
description: Medical research methodology framework — 20 skills with selective constraints covering the full research pipeline. Supports clinical, basic science, AI/ML, qualitative, and survey research design. 234 journal templates, 42+ reporting standards (CONSORT 2025, STROBE, PRISMA, TRIPOD-AI, DECIDE-AI, IDEAL), PubMed MCP integration, one-click .docx export.
